title: Nursery Rhyme. CXCIII. Riddles.
content:
[A swarm of bees.]

    As I was going o'er Tipple Tine,
    I met a flock of bonny swine;
        Some green-lapp'd,
        Some green-back'd;
    They were the very bonniest swine
    That e'er went over Tipple Tine.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CXCIII. Riddles." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
